research.title: It’s 37oC, And All We Can Think About Is ColdFusion (Adobe ColdFusion Security Bulletin APSB26-68 CVE Bonanza)
research.summary: We’re back, melting - we’ve tried shouting, screaming, and throwing things at the Sun, and it is just not working. Before we begin our analysis, we want to be clear - given the number of vulnerabilities fixed (and some not mentioned..), we’ve struggled to.

research.title: How GitHub used secret scanning to reach inbox zero
research.summary: Several years ago, GitHub Security launched an initiative to assess and improve our overall secrets hygiene. As part of that effort, we piloted the Secret Scanning capability that was under development at the time. That’s when we found more than 20,000.

vulns.title: Drupal Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at evidencebasedvulnerability/cve-2026-9082-drupal.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/evidencebasedvulnerability/cve-2026-9082-drupal
cd cve-2026-9082-drupal
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Core
credential access from service context
webshell or command execution follow-up
internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (CVE-2026-31694): a malicious FUSE server overflows a.
vulns.summary: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.
vulns.technicalSummary: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.
vulns.breakdown: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.

vulns.title: OliveTin is a self-hosted web UI for exposing predefined shell commands to end users. This repository.
